inputs.label: Nanograms
inputs.businessContext: Per-item mass in nanograms (1 ng = 1e-9 g)

businessContext_i18n.en: Per-item mass in nanograms (1 ng = 1e-9 g)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parça başına nanogram cinsinden kütle (1 ng = 1e-9 g)
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse pro Stück in Nanogramm (1 ng = 1e-9 g)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse par article en nanogrammes (1 ng = 1e-9 g)
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa por unidad en nanogramos (1 ng = 1e-9 g)

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Number of nanograms in one microgram (standard: 1000)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of nanograms in one microgram (standard: 1000)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de nanogrammes dans un microgramme (standard : 1000)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de nanogramos en un microgramo (estándar: 1000)

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the final result

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the final result
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai sonuç için ondalık basamak sayısı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat final
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el resultado final

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of items in the batch (total mass = per-item mass × batch size)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of items in the batch (total mass = per-item mass × batch size)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Partideki öğe sayısı (toplam kütle = parça başına kütle × parti büyüklüğü)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Stücke in der Charge (Gesamtmasse = Masse pro Stück × Chargengröße)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'articles dans le lot (masse totale = masse par article × taille du lot)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades en el lote (masa total = masa por unidad × tamaño del lote)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
